summary: Solid soundboard recording that captures a chaotic, jam‑heavy show with standout Half Step > Rider and Used to Love Her moments.
review: The taping is praised as a “really good” soundboard capture, with crowd chatter trimmed for listening. Musically the night is described as a “barn burner” full of nonstop jams – especially the epic Half Step > Rider sequence and an inspired Used to Love Her – though the reviewer laments the indoor venue’s cramped atmosphere compared to earlier outdoor shows.

ai_rating.rationale: The lone review is enthusiastic about the performance and recording but also critiques the venue experience; overall the show sounds strong with good soundboard quality, leading to a solid mid‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a really good recording with crowd noise clipped for the Dead Hour; no major flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as chaotic and nonstop, with jams flowing from one tune to the next; high energy but hampered by indoor crowd congestion.
